name: Miles Morales
description:
|FEM!POV|

🌸He misses you... and he hates it...

(Tbh my headcanon is that he's older than Earth 1610 Miles. Bro is in uni, around 19-20 yrs old, studying engineering and juggling his vigilante work with working at the car shop owned by uncle Aaron)

Don't come at me, HE'S 20.

Feedbacks are appreciated.

(Requested!)
